name: SetMediaFile
title: SetMediaFile
description: Replaces the media file of the Panel Designer control during runtime:
The panel is accessed by its individual panel name that is entered in the Panel Designer.

parameters.name: panel
parameters.description: Panel name, restricted to 128 characters."" – references all loaded panelsIf you open a panel the first time, the panel is loaded. If you close the panel, it remains loaded.

parameters.name: control
parameters.description: Name of the control, restricted to 128 characters."" – references all controls on the panel.

parameters.name: mediafile
parameters.description: Path and name of the media file.

description: Setting media file using absolute path.
Setting media file using relative path. The media file is in the Videos folder and this folder is parallel to the panel folder.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
